mapper.select:
SELECT tr.treatment_result_id, tr.procedure_result_id, tr.status, tr.progress_status, tr.treatment_at, tr.nursing_id, tr.nurse_name, tr.detail, tr.patient_id, tr.patient_name, tr.department_name FROM CHJ.TREATMENT_RESULT tr
AND tr.patient_name LIKE '%' || #{patientName} || '%'
AND tr.department_name LIKE '%' || #{departmentName} || '%'
AND UPPER(TRIM(tr.progress_status)) = UPPER(TRIM(#{progressStatus}))
AND tr.treatment_at >= TO_TIMESTAMP(#{startDate} || ' 00:00:00', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
AND tr.treatment_at <= TO_TIMESTAMP(#{endDate} || ' 23:59:59', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
ORDER BY tr.treatment_at DESC NULLS LAST, tr.treatment_result_id DESC
